components.name: RootLayout
components.purpose: Root layout with auth state provider, theme context, and global navigation wrapper.

components.name: Navbar
components.purpose: Top navigation bar with role-based menu items, user profile, and logout.

components.name: LoginPage
components.purpose: Authentication entry point with email/password login and role selection.

components.name: SignupPage
components.purpose: User registration form for patients, doctors, and administrators.

components.name: PatientDashboard
components.purpose: Patient home view showing medical records summary, upcoming appointments, and medication alerts.

components.name: DoctorDashboard
components.purpose: Doctor home view with patient access requests, clinical summaries queue, and recent consultations.

components.name: AdminDashboard
components.purpose: Hospital administrator view with compliance metrics, treatment timelines, and operational bottlenecks.

components.name: DocumentList
components.purpose: Paginated list of patient's uploaded medical documents with filters and search.

components.name: DocumentUploadForm
components.purpose: Multimodal file upload component with AI extraction progress and preview.

components.name: DocumentDetail
components.purpose: Single document view with extracted facts, source snippets, and fact-to-source tracing.

components.name: KnowledgeGraph
components.purpose: Interactive visualization of patient history (visits, medications, conditions, tests, doctors).

components.name: MedicationList
components.purpose: List of patient's medications with interaction warnings and plain-language explanations.

components.name: DrugInteractionAlert
components.purpose: Alert component displaying detected drug interactions and duplicate medications.

components.name: AccessRequestForm
components.purpose: Form for doctors to request time-limited OTP-based access to patient records.

components.name: AccessLog
components.purpose: Audit trail of all doctor access attempts with timestamps, OTP verification status, and actions taken.

components.name: ClinicalSummary
components.purpose: AI-generated clinical summary with source verification, extracted facts, and document citations.

components.name: SpecialistRecommendation
components.purpose: Component suggesting appropriate specialists based on patient data with medical disclaimers.

components.name: AppointmentList
components.purpose: List of scheduled and missed appointments with follow-up reminders and rescheduling options.

components.name: AnalyticsDashboard
components.purpose: Hospital-level analytics on compliance rates, treatment timelines, and operational bottlenecks.

boundaries: Authentication & Authorization (login, signup, OTP verification, role-based access)
Patient Records (medical history, medications, appointments, conditions)
Clinical Intelligence (drug interactions, duplicate detection, specialist recommendations)
Access Control & Audit (doctor access requests, OTP grants, audit logging)
AI Integration (multimodal extraction, clinical summaries, fact tracing)
architecture.state_management: TanStack Query (API-heavy document extraction, real-time access logs) + React Context (auth state, user role, facility context) + Zustand (collaborative knowledge graph state)
notable_dirs: src/app/patient — patient-scoped routes (dashboard, documents, medications, appointments, access-logs)
src/app/doctor — doctor-scoped routes (dashboard, summaries, patient access)
src/app/admin — admin-scoped routes (dashboard, analytics, facility management)
src/components — shared UI (navbar, forms, alerts, knowledge graph, recommendations)
src/lib/ai — AI extraction, summarization, interaction detection, specialist recommendation logic
src/lib/audit — access logging, fact tracing, source verification

flows.name: patient-document-upload-and-review
flows.summary: Patient uploads medical document → AI extracts structured facts → patient reviews extracted data with source tracing → knowledge graph updates automatically.

flows.name: doctor-access-and-clinical-summary
flows.summary: Doctor requests patient access → patient grants OTP → doctor receives AI-generated clinical summary with source verification → audit log records all actions.

flows.name: medication-safety-check
flows.summary: Patient views medication list → system detects drug interactions and duplicates → alerts displayed with plain-language explanations → patient can share with doctor.

flows.name: appointment-follow-up-detection
flows.summary: System analyzes appointment history → identifies missed follow-ups → generates reminders → recommends appropriate specialists based on condition history.

flows.name: hospital-compliance-monitoring
flows.summary: Administrator views facility-level analytics → monitors compliance rates, treatment timelines, and operational bottlenecks → exports reports for quality improvement.

flows.name: knowledge-graph-exploration
flows.summary: Patient interacts with knowledge graph → explores relationships between visits, medications, conditions, tests, and doctors → clicks nodes to view detailed records.

flows.name: access-audit-and-transparency
flows.summary: Patient reviews complete audit trail of doctor access attempts → verifies OTP verification status → sees all actions taken by each doctor → maintains full transparency.
